reviews.comment:
Muy rápidos en atención y esmerada, aunq no les funcionaba la APP YPF y no tenían compresor para aire de neumaticos

(Translated by Google)
Very quick and attentive service, although their YPF app wasn't working and they didn't have a tire inflator.

reviews.comment:
Pongan más empleados para atender.... El que me tenía que atender estaba tratando de que le den propina estuvo 20 minutos con el auto de alado. Y el pibe de la otra punta que despacho más de 6 autos en esos 20 minutos me vino atender por qué vio la inoperancia de su compañero.

(Translated by Google)
Hire more staff to serve customers... The guy who was supposed to help me was trying to get a tip and spent 20 minutes with the car next to me. And the guy from the other end, who served more than 6 cars in those 20 minutes, came to help me because he saw how inefficient his coworker was.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2511053987051317301/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtdDRyWTBRRRAB
